pageContext.name: Hitchhiking Ghosts
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are excited to present Disney's Hitchhiking Ghosts Figurine!  New from the Disney Showcase Collection, Gus, Ezra, and Phineas are ghoulishly delightful in opalescent paint that shimmers in the moonlight. As the beloved Disney attraction warns 'Beware of Hitchhiking Ghosts!'  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your collection today.
